---
title: "Office Hours - Mathematical Analysis"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
editor: visual
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

Office: F2409 Unistructure

Tuesday: 11:30-1:30PM

Zoom: [Link](https://bryant.zoom.us/j/4419675207)
